args.code:
import pandas as pd
businesses_la = pd.DataFrame(locals()['var_function-call-983709243760968754'])
reviews_la = pd.DataFrame(locals()['var_function-call-14540832353120741319'])

reviews_la['rating'] = reviews_la['rating'].astype(int)

merged_df = pd.merge(businesses_la, reviews_la, on='gmap_id')

average_ratings = merged_df.groupby('name')['rating'].mean().reset_index()
average_ratings = average_ratings.sort_values(by='rating', ascending=False)

top_5_businesses = average_ratings.head(5)

print('__RESULT__:')
print(top_5_businesses.to_json(orient='records'))

val_args.code:
import pandas as pd
businesses_la = pd.DataFrame(locals()['var_function-call-983709243760968754'])
reviews_la = pd.DataFrame(locals()['var_function-call-14540832353120741319'])

reviews_la['rating'] = reviews_la['rating'].astype(int)

merged_df = pd.merge(businesses_la, reviews_la, on='gmap_id')

average_ratings = merged_df.groupby('name')['rating'].mean().reset_index()
average_ratings = average_ratings.sort_values(by='rating', ascending=False)

top_5_businesses = average_ratings.head(5)

print('__RESULT__:')
print(top_5_businesses.to_json(orient='records'))
